## Overview

`defenseclaw reset` — Wipe ~/.defenseclaw so 'defenseclaw quickstart' starts clean.

## Reference

<!-- BEGIN AUTOGEN:cli_py:reset -->
<!-- Do not edit by hand. Regenerate with `make docs-gen`. -->

### Synopsis

```bash
defenseclaw reset [OPTIONS]
```

### Description

Wipe ~/.defenseclaw so 'defenseclaw quickstart' starts clean

Wipe ~/.defenseclaw so 'defenseclaw quickstart' starts clean.

    Keeps binaries and the OpenClaw plugin installed so reinstall is
    fast. For a full uninstall use 'defenseclaw uninstall --all
    --binaries'.

### Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Env var | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `--yes` | boolean | — | — | no | Skip the confirmation prompt. |

<!-- END AUTOGEN:cli_py:reset -->

## Usage

### Reset local DefenseClaw state

```bash
defenseclaw reset --yes
```

`reset` is destructive and only exposes the confirmation bypass. Use [Uninstall](/docs-site/cli/commands/uninstall) for dry-run and binary-removal options.
